// Perspective expression — cross-version name stability dump
//
// Paste into Markdown component props.source (requires escapeHtml: false).
//
// What it probes:
//   Q7: Uses TWO paths to reach the session store:
//     PATH A: window.__client (canonical in 8.3.x — confirmed by Probe 1)
//     PATH B: fiber walk from .ia-display-markdown / input[type=text] / [class*=ia-]
//   Compares the two paths and logs whether they resolve to the same object.
//   Then walks all fiber levels logging every store's own-keys and proto methods.
//   Then checks a canonical list of expected method/key names against the actual
//   live session, page, view, params objects. Reports OK / MISSING for each.
//
// Run this on each new IA build (8.3.0, 8.3.6, 8.1.x, etc.) and compare the
// output to track which names are stable and which have been mangled/renamed.
// Copy the console output (full walk + check section) to a dated file in
// findings/ for future reference.
//
// Probe 6 retains the fiber walk in addition to window.__client so we can detect
// when window.__client disappears in future builds.



concat(
  '<div id="recon-output" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;background:#0a0a18;color:#88ee88;padding:10px;height:300px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;border-radius:4px">Running Probe 6...</div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">')
